title: Rust Enablement Initiative
description: Spearheaded Rust adoption for STM32 embedded development across Eaton

title: Renode + Robot Framework Automation
description: Built virtual HIL test platform eliminating physical hardware dependencies

Unblocked 4+ teams with limited hardware access

title: Flex PDU Flashing GUI
description: Architected Qt/C++ cross-platform tool for automated PDU firmware updates
Implemented error-proofing and config-driven validation logic
Enabling non-engineers to perform firmware updates independently

title: Rapid Improvement Events (RIE)
description: Organized and facilitated TDD and CI/CD workshops for firmware teams
Drove cross-functional alignment on embedded testing best practices
Created reusable workshop course in Eaton University

title: President - Eastern NC Toastmasters
description: Led strategic planning and weekly operations for 15–25 member club

Grew member engagement through structured speaking programs

title: Co-Lead - LDP Engagement Committee
description: Organized quarterly cross-functional sessions across regions

title: Co-Lead - SWE West Coast
description: Represented Eaton at regional Society of Women Engineers events

title: Design Thinking Facilitator
description: Certified facilitator leading cross-functional innovation sessions at Eaton
